sections.paragraph:
Original: פּצּץ

Transliteration: pitstsêts

Phonetic: pits-tsates'

BDB Definition:

Aphses = "to break"
  1. a priest, chief of the 18th course in the service of the temple in the time of David

Origin: from an unused root meaning to dissever

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
